combat_history.event: HMS Trent intercepted Spanish Guardia Civil vessels in disputed Gibraltar waters, demonstrating UK sovereignty claims
combat_history.significance: Showed the utility of OPVs in sovereignty disputes where larger warships might escalate tensions

combat_history.event: HMS Medway seized 3 tonnes of cocaine worth £300 million in Caribbean operations
combat_history.significance: Demonstrated effectiveness in constabulary operations and counter-narcotics missions

combat_history.event: HMS Trent conducted presence patrols in North Sea and English Channel during Russian invasion of Ukraine
combat_history.significance: Showed role in protecting critical national infrastructure and sea lanes during crisis

modernization.description: Integration of improved EO/IR sensors, encrypted communications, and enhanced boarding equipment
modernization.impact: Improved intelligence gathering and interdiction capabilities

modernization.description: Evaluation of adding soft-kill defensive systems and improved radar for operations in contested waters
modernization.impact: Would enable limited operations in higher threat environments

vulnerabilities.description: Completely vulnerable to air attack with no surface-to-air missiles or CIWS systems
vulnerabilities.context: Cannot operate in contested airspace or areas with hostile air presence
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Reliance on air cover from other platforms or operating in permissive environments only

vulnerabilities.description: Limited electronic warfare capabilities and countermeasures against modern threats
vulnerabilities.context: Vulnerable to jamming and electronic attack in near-peer conflict scenarios
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Planned upgrades to communications and some EW systems

vulnerabilities.description: 30mm gun insufficient against modern fast attack craft or armed patrol boats
vulnerabilities.context: Limited ability to engage surface threats beyond small boats and civilian vessels
vulnerabilities.mitigation: Designed to operate with frigate or destroyer support in higher threat areas

operational_patterns.typical_deployment: Forward presence operations, fisheries protection, counter-narcotics, sovereignty patrols
operational_patterns.typical_task_group: Independent operations or with allied patrol vessels
operational_patterns.readiness_notes: High availability due to commercial-standard systems and reduced maintenance requirements

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Holland-class is smaller (3750 tonnes) but better armed with 76mm gun and potential for missiles. River-class prioritizes endurance and cost efficiency.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: NATO OPV comparison - different approaches to offshore patrol mission requirements

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Type 056 is smaller but heavily armed with missiles and ASW capability. River-class is constabulary-focused while Type 056 is a light warship.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Patrol vessel vs corvette philosophy - constabulary operations vs light combat capability

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Comandanti-class has better sensors and 76mm gun but shorter range. Both designed for Mediterranean/regional operations.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: European patrol vessel comparison - UK vs Italian approach to maritime security

peer_comparisons.key_differences: Legend-class is larger (4500 tonnes) with 57mm gun and potential missile capability. River-class is more austere but cheaper to operate.
peer_comparisons.video_angle: Coast Guard vs Navy patrol vessels - different service approaches to similar missions
